item.title: 6.6]紋身貼紙可以測腦波？｜AI包辦的學術研究能信嗎？｜光合作用的演進竟然！｜微波戰勝無人機群攻！｜【泛科學NEWS】feat. 游宇潼
item.itunes:title: 6.6]紋身貼紙可以測腦波？｜AI包辦的學術研究能信嗎？｜光合作用的演進竟然！｜微波戰勝無人機群攻！｜【泛科學NEWS】feat. 游宇潼

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=01BJtGR7JVQ

// 本週新聞 //
A wireless forehead e-tattoo for mental workload estimation
https://www.cell.com/device/fulltext/S2666-9986(25)00094-8
First Measurement of Near- and Sub-Threshold J/ψ Photoproduction off Nuclei
https://arxiv.org/pdf/2409.18463
Detection of X-ray emission from a bright long-period radio transient  
https://www.nature.com/articles/s41586-025-09077-w
Structure and evolution of photosystem I in the early-branching cyanobacterium Anthocerotibacter panamensis
https://www.pnas.org/doi/10.1073/pnas.2427090122
This giant microwave may change the future of war  
https://www.technologyreview.com/2025/05/29/1117502/epirus-drone-zapping-microwave-us-military-defense/
Robin: A multi-agent system for automating scientific discovery
https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.13400

https://phys.org/news/2025-05-kind-physicists-gluons-nuclei-atoms.html

https://chandra.si.edu/photo/2025/lprt/?utm_
https://www.space.com/astronomy/mystery-deepens-cosmic-energy-lpt-askap-j1832-0911?utm_source=perplexity

item.title: 6.6]這個世界是二維的？霍金從黑洞身上瞭解了什麼宇宙奧秘？物理學家是如何描述這個世界的？｜量子熊 ✕ 泛科學 EP18

item.title: 5.30]牙齒本來不在嘴裡？猴子會綁架嬰兒！住夜市旁=肺功能較差？科學家打算替北極補冰？閉上眼還可以看世界？！【泛科學新聞】

https://www.nature.com/articles/s41370-025-00755-5

https://pulitzercenter.org/stories/inside-bold-geoengineering-work-refreeze-arctics-disappearing-ice

item.title: 5.29]宇宙中最難以理解的「點」！物理定律在此完全崩壞？如果到達黑洞裡面的奇異點，到底會發生什麼？｜量子熊 ✕ 泛科學 EP17
